/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcutefishnm_qmlplugins.so -o libcutefishnm_qmlplugins.so CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/cutefishnm_qmlplugins_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/appletproxymodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/activeconnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/networkitemslist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/networkmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/networkmodelitem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/wiressitemsettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/uiutils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/identitymodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/configuration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/enabledconnections.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/enums.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/wifisettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishnm_qmlplugins.dir/qmlplugins.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6NetworkManagerQt.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ModemManagerQt.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libnm.so /usr/lib/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
